Artist.Insert: INSERT INTO artists (Name) VALUES (@Name) RETURNING ArtistId AS ID
Artist.Select: SELECT ArtistId AS ID, Name FROM artists a WHERE ArtistId = ?@ID AND ArtistID IN (?@IDs_X) AND ?@AlbumAmount <= (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Albums al WHERE al.ArtistId == a.ArtistId) ORDER BY ArtistId LIMIT ?@PageSize_N OFFSET /*@PageSize*/?@Offset_N
Artist.Update: UPDATE artists SET Name = @Name WHERE ArtistId = @ID
Artist.Delete: DELETE FROM tracks WHERE AlbumId IN (SELECT AlbumId FROM albums WHERE ArtistId = @ID); DELETE FROM albums WHERE ArtistId = @ID; DELETE FROM artists WHERE ArtistId = @ID;

Album.Insert: INSERT INTO albums (Title, ArtistId) VALUES (@Title, @ArtistId) RETURNING AlbumId AS ID
Album.Select: SELECT a.AlbumId AS ID, a.Title, a.ArtistId AS ArtistID&, ar.Name AS ArtistName FROM albums a INNER JOIN artists ar ON a.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId WHERE a.AlbumId = ?@ID AND a.ArtistId = ?@ArtistID
Album.Update: UPDATE albums SET Title = ?@Title, ArtistId = ?@ArtistId WHERE AlbumId = @ID
Album.Delete: DELETE FROM tracks WHERE AlbumId = @ID; DELETE FROM albums WHERE AlbumId = @ID;

Track.Insert: INSERT INTO tracks (Name, AlbumId, MediaTypeId, GenreId, Composer, Milliseconds, Bytes, UnitPrice) VALUES (@Name, @AlbumId, @MediaTypeId, @GenreId, @Composer, @Milliseconds, @Bytes, @UnitPrice) RETURNING TrackId AS ID
Track.Select: SELECT t.TrackId AS ID, t.Name, t.Composer, t.Milliseconds, t.Bytes, t.UnitPrice, t.AlbumId AS AlbumID&, al.Title AS AlbumTitle&, al.ArtistId AS AlbumArtistID&, art.Name AS AlbumArtistName, t.MediaTypeId AS MediaTypeID, mt.Name AS MediaTypeName, t.GenreId AS GenreID, g.Name AS GenreName FROM tracks t INNER JOIN albums al ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId INNER JOIN Artists art ON art.ArtistId = al.ArtistID INNER JOIN media_types mt ON t.MediaTypeId = mt.MediaTypeId INNER JOIN genres g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId WHERE t.TrackId = ?@ID AND t.AlbumId = ?@AlbumID
Track.Update: UPDATE tracks SET Name = ?@Name, AlbumId = ?@AlbumId, MediaTypeId = ?@MediaTypeId, GenreId = ?@GenreId, Composer = ?@Composer, Milliseconds = ?@Milliseconds, Bytes = ?@Bytes, UnitPrice = ?@UnitPrice WHERE TrackId = @ID
Track.Delete: DELETE FROM playlist_track WHERE TrackId = @ID; DELETE FROM invoice_items WHERE TrackId = @ID; DELETE FROM tracks WHERE TrackId = @ID;

Genre.Insert: INSERT INTO genres (Name) VALUES (@Value) RETURNING GenreId AS ID
Genre.Select: SELECT GenreId AS ID, Name FROM genres WHERE GenreId = ?@ID
Genre.Update: UPDATE genres SET Name = @Name WHERE GenreId = @ID

MediaType.Insert: INSERT INTO media_types (Name) VALUES (@Value) RETURNING MediaTypeId AS ID
MediaType.Select: SELECT MediaTypeId AS ID, Name FROM media_types WHERE MediaTypeId = ?@ID
MediaType.Update: UPDATE media_types SET Name = @Name WHERE MediaTypeId = @ID

Employee.Insert: INSERT INTO employees (LastName, FirstName, Title, ReportsTo, BirthDate, HireDate, Address, City, State, Country, PostalCode, Phone, Fax, Email) VALUES (@LastName, @FirstName, @Title, @ReportsTo, @BirthDate, @HireDate, @Address, @City, @State, @Country, @PostalCode, @Phone, @Fax, @Email) RETURNING EmployeeId AS ID
Employee.Select: SELECT e.EmployeeId AS ID, e.FirstName, e.LastName, e.Title, e.BirthDate, e.HireDate, e.Address, e.City, e.State, e.Country, e.PostalCode, e.Phone, e.Fax, e.Email, e.ReportsTo AS ManagerID&, m.FirstName AS ManagerFirstName&, m.LastName AS ManagerLastName&, m.Title AS ManagerTitle FROM employees e LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.ReportsTo = m.EmployeeId WHERE e.EmployeeId = ?@ID AND e.ReportsTo = ?@ReportsTo
Employee.Update: UPDATE employees SET LastName = ?@LastName, FirstName = ?@FirstName, Title = ?@Title, ReportsTo = ?@ReportsTo, BirthDate = ?@BirthDate, HireDate = ?@HireDate, Address = ?@Address, City = ?@City, State = ?@State, Country = ?@Country, PostalCode = ?@PostalCode, Phone = ?@Phone, Fax = ?@Fax, Email = ?@Email WHERE EmployeeId = @ID
Employee.Delete: UPDATE employees SET ReportsTo = NULL WHERE ReportsTo = @ID; UPDATE customers SET SupportRepId = NULL WHERE SupportRepId = @ID; DELETE FROM employees WHERE EmployeeId = @ID;

Customer.Insert: INSERT INTO customers (FirstName, LastName, /*@Company*/Company, Address, City, /*@State*/State, Country, PostalCode, Phone, /*@Fax*/Fax, Email, SupportRepId) VALUES (@FirstName, @LastName, ?@Company, @Address, @City, ?@State, @Country, @PostalCode, @Phone, ?@Fax, @Email, @SupportRepId) RETURNING CustomerId AS ID
Customer.Select: SELECT c.CustomerId AS ID, c.FirstName, c.LastName, c.Company, c.Address, c.City, c.State, c.Country, c.PostalCode, c.Phone, c.Fax, c.Email, c.SupportRepId AS SupportRepID, e.FirstName AS SupportRepFirstName, e.LastName AS SupportRepLastName, e.Title AS SupportRepTitle FROM customers c LEFT JOIN employees e ON c.SupportRepId = e.EmployeeId WHERE c.CustomerId = ?@ID
Customer.Update: UPDATE customers SET FirstName = ?@FirstName, LastName = ?@LastName, Company = ?@Company, Address = ?@Address, City = ?@City, State = ?@State, Country = ?@Country, PostalCode = ?@PostalCode, Phone = ?@Phone, Fax = ?@Fax, Email = ?@Email, SupportRepId = ?@SupportRepId WHERE CustomerId = @ID
Customer.Delete: DELETE FROM invoice_items WHERE InvoiceId IN (SELECT InvoiceId FROM invoices WHERE CustomerId = @ID); DELETE FROM invoices WHERE CustomerId = @ID; DELETE FROM customers WHERE CustomerId = @ID;

Invoice.Insert: INSERT INTO invoices (CustomerId, InvoiceDate, BillingAddress, BillingCity, BillingState, BillingCountry, BillingPostalCode, Total) VALUES (@CustomerId, @InvoiceDate, @BillingAddress, @BillingCity, @BillingState, @BillingCountry, @BillingPostalCode, @Total) RETURNING InvoiceId AS ID
Invoice.Select: SELECT i.InvoiceId AS ID, i.InvoiceDate, i.Total, i.BillingAddress, i.BillingCity, i.BillingState, i.BillingCountry, i.BillingPostalCode, i.CustomerId AS CustomerID&, c.FirstName AS CustomerFirstName&, c.LastName AS CustomerLastName&, c.Company AS CustomerCompany&, c.Address AS CustomerAddress&, c.City AS CustomerCity&, c.State AS CustomerState&, c.Country AS CustomerCountry&, c.PostalCode AS CustomerPostalCode&, c.Phone AS CustomerPhone&, c.Fax AS CustomerFax&, c.Email AS CustomerEmail&, c.SupportRepId AS CustomerSupportRepID&, e.FirstName AS CustomerSupportRepFirstName&, e.LastName AS CustomerSupportRepLastName&, e.Title AS CustomerSupportRepTitle FROM invoices i INNER JOIN customers c ON i.CustomerId = c.CustomerId LEFT JOIN employees e ON c.SupportRepId = e.EmployeeId WHERE i.InvoiceId = ?@ID AND i.CustomerId = ?@CustomerID
Invoice.Update: UPDATE invoices SET CustomerId = ?@CustomerId, InvoiceDate = ?@InvoiceDate, BillingAddress = ?@BillingAddress, BillingCity = ?@BillingCity, BillingState = ?@BillingState, BillingCountry = ?@BillingCountry, BillingPostalCode = ?@BillingPostalCode, Total = ?@Total WHERE InvoiceId = @ID
Invoice.Delete: DELETE FROM invoice_items WHERE InvoiceId = @ID; DELETE FROM invoices WHERE InvoiceId = @ID;

InvoiceLine.Insert: INSERT INTO invoice_items (InvoiceId, TrackId, UnitPrice, Quantity) VALUES (@InvoiceId, @TrackId, @UnitPrice, @Quantity) RETURNING InvoiceLineId AS ID
InvoiceLine.Select: SELECT ii.InvoiceLineId AS ID, ii.UnitPrice, ii.Quantity, ii.InvoiceId AS InvoiceID, ii.TrackId AS TrackID, t.Name AS TrackName FROM invoice_items ii INNER JOIN tracks t ON ii.TrackId = t.TrackId /*@ArtistName*/LEFT JOIN albums al ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId /*@ArtistName*/LEFT JOIN artists art ON al.ArtistId = art.ArtistId WHERE ii.InvoiceLineId = ?@ID AND ii.InvoiceId = ?@InvoiceID AND art.Name LIKE '%' || ?@ArtistName || '%'
InvoiceLine.Update: UPDATE invoice_items SET InvoiceId = ?@InvoiceId, TrackId = ?@TrackId, UnitPrice = ?@UnitPrice, Quantity = ?@Quantity WHERE InvoiceLineId = @ID

DynaEndpoints.Name: tracks
DynaEndpoints.Template: SELECT t.TrackId, t.Name, /*Genre*/g.Name as Genre FROM tracks t /*Genre|@Genre*/INNER JOIN genres g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId WHERE g.Name LIKE '%' || ?@Genre || '%'

DynaEndpoints.Name: customers
DynaEndpoints.Template: ?SELECT c.CustomerId AS ID, c.FirstName, c.LastName, /*#adm*/c.Phone FROM customers c
